def.description: QuestScriptDef def name or $varName for the subscript to run.

prefix.description: Slate variable prefix applied to the subscript.

allowNonPrefixedLookup.description: SlateRef<bool> literal, expression, or $varName; allows fallback to unprefixed variables.

parms.description: Named child map of subscript parameter name to SlateRef<object> value expression; values may be any literal, expression, XML fragment, or $varName.

returnVarNames.description: Variable names copied back out of the subscript prefix scope.
